title: Galeottia haematodes
taxonomy: Galeottia haematodes is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. This orchid species is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Cymbidieae. The genus Galeottia is also part of the orchid family, and it contains several species. Further classification of Galeottia haematodes can be found in the binomial nomenclature system.
